task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the hardware schematic file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/hardware_schematic.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent opens QGroundControl and navigates to the vehicle parameters setup menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open, and the 'Parameters' tab/menu is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the required CAM parameters in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl parameters list shows CAM_TRIGG_TYPE set to 1, CAM_DURATION set to 15, CAM_MAX_ROLL set to 25, CAM_FEEDBACK_PIN set to 54, and CAM_FEEDBACK_POL set to 0.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the required SERVO parameter in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl parameters list shows SERVO9_FUNCTION set to 10.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the commissioning report at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command showing the creation or saving of a file named 'ppk_integration_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

task_completion.description: The commissioning report contains the required specific mentions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'ppk_integration_report.txt' are visible and explicitly include the words 'Sony', 'AUX 1', and 'AUX 5'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual QGroundControl GUI to set parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and typing within the QGroundControl application window, rather than using external scripts or terminal commands to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created the report file rather than just echoing text to standard output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a text editor (like nano, gedit, vim) or a valid shell redirection command to write to the actual file path, rather than just printing the text to the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually tamper with the evaluation result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent manually creating or editing '/tmp/task_result.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The hardware schematic is located at '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/hardware_schematic.txt'. The exact parameters that must be configured in QGroundControl are: CAM_TRIGG_TYPE = 1, CAM_DURATION = 15, CAM_MAX_ROLL = 25, SERVO9_FUNCTION = 10, CAM_FEEDBACK_PIN = 54, and CAM_FEEDBACK_POL = 0. The commissioning report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/ppk_integration_report.txt' and must explicitly contain the text 'Sony', 'AUX 1', and 'AUX 5'.
